# CWE-798: Use of Hard-coded Credentials (mitigated)
lang: go
file: CWE-798-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"os"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"github.com/jmoiron/sqlx"
)

// Safe: credentials are loaded from environment at runtime.
func ConnectReporting(c *gin.Context) {
	dsn := os.Getenv("REPORTING_DSN")
	db, err := sqlx.Connect("postgres", dsn)
	if err != nil {
		c.String(http.StatusInternalServerError, "connection failed")
		return
	}
	defer db.Close()
	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"connected": true})
}
